content_of_post_to_comment:
Hello all. I've a big problem. I'm mostly looking for people who can relate and can give some advice.

I try to get disciplined.. I start the phase, think everything out real well and I am ready.

I do well for 7-10 days.. And then I start feeling depressed.. I ask myself is that all? Am I going to have to live like this forever?..

It gets depressing and then suddenly the idea of watching porn creeps up my mind.

I've been struggling with porn but.. I somehow manage it.

I stop myself..continue the same hard life.. Until I start aching for some pleasure again .. And then I mess up.. Watch porn the entire day.. Until I feel horrible and start the cycle again..

How do I fix this..

I get depressed and then start aching for pleasure..

Somehow porn is the topmost thing in my mind.

Porn is a seperate issue, but the feeling of depression and nothing exciting anymore.. Messes my mind up.
